groups.thesis: Sector under pressure with avg YTD return of -13.8%. Weak breadth — just 0/5 stocks outperforming S&P 500. 60% above 50-day MA, trend intact but mixed. Healthy momentum (avg RSI 52).
groups.thesis_breaker: S&P 500 correction below 6859 (10% off 7621 high). Momentum breakdown if avg RSI drops below 40 (currently 52). Trend weakening — 2/5 (40%) already below 50-day MA, critical if >50%. Group leadership fragile (avg YTD -13.8%), at risk of turning negative.
